The production backend is on commit f1eb2fb7, but local HEAD has many unpushed commits including the SMS recovery code. Rork auto-syncs code, but production hasn't deployed yet. Let me check the deploy setup to understand how to trigger a deploy, and verify the SMS recovery code is correct.

Let me check the deploy mechanism and the recovery route handler.

input.command: cat render.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -60; echo "---deploy dir---"; ls deploy/ 2>/dev/null

output.stdout:
# IVX Blueprint v5 — force deploy 2026-07-01T22:15:00Z — commit 28bb5d7
services:
  - type: web
    name: ivx-holdings-platform
    repo: https://github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest
    branch: main
    runtime: docker
    dockerfilePath: ./Dockerfile
    dockerContext: .
    dockerCommand: node /app/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs /app/server.ts
    plan: starter
    # IVX: auto-deploy on every push to main (owner-requested).
    autoDeployTrigger: commit
    healthCheckPath: /health
    domains:
      - api.ivxholding.com
    renderSubdomainPolicy: disabled
    disk:
      name: ivx-holdings-data
      mountPath: /app/data
      sizeGB: 1
    envVars:
      - key: NODE_ENV
        value: production
      - key: HOST
        value: 0.0.0.0
      - key: PORT
        value: 3000
      - key: CHAT_DATABASE_PATH
        value: /app/data/chat-room.sqlite
      - key: IVX_DATA_DIR
        value: /app/data
      - key: CHAT_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
        value: https://chat.ivxholding.com,https://api.ivxholding.com,https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com,https://ivx-holdings-chat-frontend.onrender.com
      - key: EXPO_PUBLIC_CHAT_SOCKET_PATH
        value: /socket.io
      - key: EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_ENV
        value: production
      - key: API_BASE_URL
        value: https://api.ivxholding.com
      - key: EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL
        value: https://api.ivxholding.com
      - key: EXPO_PUBLIC_IVX_API_BASE_URL
        value: https://api.ivxholding.com
      - key: EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL
        value: https://api.ivxholding.com
      - key: EXPO_PUBLIC_PRODUCTION_API_URL
        value: https://api.ivxholding.com
      - key: EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_URL
        value: https://chat.ivxholding.com
      - key: CHAT_ROOM_ID
        value: main-room
      - key: EXPO_PUBLIC_CHAT_DEFAULT_ROOM_ID
        value: main-room
      - key: JWT_SECRET
        sync: false
      - key: APP_SECRET
        generateValue: true
      - key: STRIPE_API_KEY
        sync: false

The deployment is still running old commit f1eb2fb78658, but the new SMS recovery code is already committed locally in commit f813a6f ("Added a way to recover your account with a text message..."). The local HEAD is 4601ca08, which is ahead of origin/main. So the SMS recovery is in the local repo but production is on the old commit. Production deployment happens automatically on push to main (autoDeployTrigger: commit). The repo on Render is `https://github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, branch main.

So the issue is: production hasn't been updated to include the new SMS recovery code. The Rork managed sync should push to GitHub, then Render auto-deploys. But the user wants verification NOW. Let me check whether the code can be deployed and whether there are env vars set.
